# cortexcloud_compliance_controls (Data Source)

Provides a filtered list of Compliance Controls.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cortexcloud_compliance_controls" "custom" {
  search_from = 0
  search_to   = 50

  filter {
    field    = "is_custom"
    operator = "in"
    value    = "true"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (Block, Optional) Filter criteria for the controls. 

Note: for the 'is_custom' field, use operator 'in' (the API does not support 'eq'; if 'eq' is specified it will be automatically converted to 'in'). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))
- `search_from` (Number) The starting index for pagination.
- `search_to` (Number) The ending index for pagination.

### Read-Only

- `controls` (Attributes List) The list of compliance controls. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--controls))
- `id` (String) Static identifier for the data source.

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Optional:

- `field` (String) The field to filter on.
- `operator` (String) The filter operator to use (e.g., 'in', 'contains').
- `value` (String) The value to filter by.


<a id="nestedatt--controls"></a>
### Nested Schema for `controls`

Read-Only:

- `category` (String) The category of the compliance control.
- `category_description` (String) The description of the category.
- `created_by` (String) The user who created the control.
- `description` (String) The description of the compliance control.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the control is enabled.
- `id` (String) The ID of the compliance control.
- `insertion_time` (Number) The insertion timestamp of the control.
- `is_custom` (Boolean) Whether the control is custom.
- `modification_time` (Number) The modification timestamp of the control.
- `modified_by` (String) The user who last modified the control.
- `name` (String) The name of the compliance control.
- `severity` (String) The severity level of the control.
- `standards` (List of String) The list of standards this control belongs to.
- `subcategory` (String) The subcategory of the compliance control.
- `subcategory_description` (String) The description of the subcategory.
- `supported` (Boolean) Whether the control is supported.
